_meta.description: D6 fixtures for mastra / gen-ui-open-advanced (open-gen-ui-advanced demo). The advanced demo embeds an iframe-rendered sandbox; the probe sends the 'Inline expression evaluator' pill and asserts iframe presence.

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui-advanced — Inline expression evaluator pill. Same generateSandboxedUi tool call as gen-ui-open; the advanced demo renders it in an iframe sandbox.

response.content: Composing the inline expression evaluator UI.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":320,"placeholderMessages":["Composing expression evaluator…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0}.card{padding:16px;background:#1e293b;border-radius:12px;margin:16px}input{width:100%;padding:8px;background:#0f172a;border:1px solid #334155;color:#e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;box-sizing:border-box}button{margin-top:8px;padding:8px 16px;background:#6366f1;border:0;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer}.out{margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8}","html":"

Inline expression evaluator

awaiting input…
","jsFunctions":"(function(){var input=document.getElementById('in');var out=document.getElementById('out');var go=document.getElementById('go');async function run(){var expr=input.value;out.textContent='evaluating…';var res=await Websandbox.connection.remote.evaluateExpression({expression:expr});out.textContent=res&&res.ok?'= '+res.value:'error: '+res.error;}go.addEventListener('click',run);input.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter')run();});})();"}

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui-advanced — Inline expression evaluator follow-up narration after generateSandboxedUi tool result lands. Mastra loops the LLM after tool results; without this fixture the 2nd call 503s.

response.content: The inline expression evaluator UI is rendered above — type an arithmetic expression and click Evaluate to see the result.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":480,"placeholderMessages":["Composing 3D axis scene…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0}.wrap{padding:16px}h1{font-size:14px;margin:0 0 8px}svg{display:block;background:#1e293b;border-radius:8px}","html":"

3D axis visualization (pitch / yaw / roll)

"}

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui-advanced — 3D axis visualization follow-up narration after generateSandboxedUi tool result lands.

response.content: The 3D axis visualization is rendered above — the colored lines show pitch (X), yaw (Y), and roll (Z) axes around a model-airplane reference.

fixtures._comment: Narration fallback for generic advanced gen-ui probe.

response.content: The advanced gen-UI flow continued with the second-step component. The chained payloads from turns 1 and 2 form the complete advanced gen-UI sequence.
